# WedHub

> Sri Lanka's Premier Luxury Wedding Marketplace

WedHub is a comprehensive marketplace connecting couples with top-tier verified wedding professionals and vendors across all 25 districts of Sri Lanka.

## Key Features
- **Curated Vendors:** Discover luxury venues, elite photographers, bridal makeup artists, decorators, and more.
- **Direct Connection:** Couples can message and negotiate with vendors directly without any middlemen or hidden platform fees.
- **Verified Excellence:** All vendors undergo a strict vetting process to ensure reliability and premium quality.
- **Planning Tools:** Browse inspiration, real wedding stories, and essential tools to plan the perfect day.

## Important Links
- Home: https://wedhub.lk/
- About Us: https://wedhub.lk/about
- Browse Vendors: https://wedhub.lk/vendors
- Contact Support: https://wedhub.lk/contact

## Contact Information
